body_excerpt: In onCreate of ConfirmConnectActivity.java, there is a possible leak of Bluetooth information due to a permissions bypass. This could lead to local escalation of privilege of a pairing Bluetooth MAC address with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
